sentiment.reasoning: Facing a regulatory review, especially concerning operational practices, introduces uncertainty, potential fines, and operational disruptions, negatively impacting the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
